oldValues.title: Infrastructure Challenges and Solutions in Schools
challenges: The school faces a challenge with classroom space.
There is no playground for students to play.
The library lacks sufficient books for students.
solutions: Building new classrooms to address the space issue.
Buying land to create a playground for students.
Adding more books to the library to improve resources.
